title: Calm down, dog!
description: Calm down your dogs by petting them.
body: # Calm down, dog! Don't you hate it when you're playing minecraft with your friends and one accidentally punches you, so now your dog want to devour them? Wouldn't it be nice if you could somehow tell your dog to just **calm down**? Calm down, dog! is a small mod that allows you to pet your (and your friends) dogs by right-clicking on them when sneaking If your dog is attacking a player or entity, petting it will cause it to cease attacking. This only works if the dog belongs to you, so don't try to pet your friends dog to get it off you! You only need to install this mod on the server. You are allowed to use this mod for your modpacks.
